caption: A woman with brown hair and glasses, wearing a grey cardigan over a floral print top, is seated at a white desk in a craft room. In the background, shelves hold various supplies, including organized markers and tools. A black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of her. On the desk, there is a blue piece of paper and a logo that reads "Camping With Jill". A sign on the wall behind her says "CHRIS STORES". As the scene progresses, the woman talks and gestures with her hands. She begins with her hands resting near the paper, then brings them inward. In the final sequence, she reaches down to pick up a white bottle from the desk, holding it in her right hand while her left hand rests on the table.
